detailedDescription:
16GB of DDR3 in a dual-channel kit.
Ideal for keeping older systems relevant for everyday multitasking.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 16GB
Generation: DDR3
Bandwidth: Up to 14.9 GB/s per channel
Voltage: 1.5V (1.35V for DDR3L)
Slots: 2 x 8GB (dual-channel)
ECC Support: No (standard) / Yes (server variants)
Compatible Sockets: LGA1155, LGA1150, AM3, AM3+
